since_last: 43% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.75%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.89% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 43% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.75%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.75%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.99%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -6.99%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +5.07%, PUBM +4.98%, SKHY +4.84%, CRNC +3.56%, CEVA +2.05%. Laggards: TSLA -6.99%, GOOGL -4.96%, NXPI -2.80%, AMZN -2.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.62% at $115.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
